scripts.dev: npm run dev -w @tms/api & npm run dev -w @tms/web
scripts.dev:light: npm run dev:light -w @tms/api & NEXT_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 npm run dev -w @tms/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w @tms/api && npm run build -w @tms/web
scripts.start: npm run start -w @tms/api & npm run start -w @tms/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @tms/api && npm run lint -w @tms/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @tms/api && npm run test -w @tms/web
